award.title: Best EdTech Platform — UAE
award.description: Recognised for excellence in digital education and innovative teaching methods.

award.title: Top 10 EdTech Startups MENA
award.description: Featured as one of the most impactful education technology companies in the region.

award.title: Gold Award — E-Learning Excellence
award.description: Awarded for outstanding contribution to online STEM education across the GCC.

award.title: Best Coding Platform 2024
award.description: Voted best coding education platform by over 10,000 developers and students.
